# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.7'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.10.2
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk-network

  logstash:
    image: logstash:7.10.2
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"
    volumes:
      - ./logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash.conf
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk-network

  kibana:
    image: kibana:7.10.2
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    networks:
      - elk-network

  apm-server:
    image: apm-server:7.10.2
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"
    environment:
      - ELASTIC_APM_SERVER_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTIC_APM_ENV=production
    networks:
      - elk-network

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
